_comment: The AMBIENT PAL registry — which set-dressing species exist and how their sheets are laid out (see PalView + tools/gen_pals.py, art authored in tools/pixelart). A world seed's ambient_pals entries pick a 'species' + 'variant' (a natural coat color, clamped to 'variants'); an entry without a species — or with one this registry doesn't know — falls back to the companion-puppet pal, so old seeds keep working. Sheets are res://assets/pals/<species>_<variant>.png: 8 motion columns (col 0 = idle), one row per RIGHT-handed facing in 'rows' (the left family mirrors at runtime). 'fly_row' (bird only) is the wing-flap cycle PalView switches to while the pal is moving.
